last_comments: Revalidated the TKT-198 runtime-default slice on the current branch and fixed stale config reporting fallbacks so the default single-node/local truth survives in managed setting and runtime metadata surfaces. Also restored the managed reporting contract expected by package tests: registry/schema version identifiers plus drift and rollback-target metadata for managed overrides. Verification: go test ./config ./framework/runtimeplan ./framework/runtimeconfig.
